name: Vertafore Insurance Agency Management API
what_it_does: Vertafore REST API for insurance agency management systems (AMS360, Sagitta). Enables AI agents to manage policy and client records, process endorsements and renewals, sync insurance data with carrier systems via IVANS, generate certificates of insurance, manage commercial lines workflows, and integrate agency management data with accounting and CRM systems.
use_cases: Retrieving client policy data and coverage summaries from insurance service agents
Automating policy renewal workflows from renewal management agents
Generating certificates of insurance from document automation agents
Syncing policy data with carrier systems via IVANS from download automation agents
not_for: Insurance carrier core systems without agency management focus
Direct-to-consumer insurance without independent agency workflows
Life and health insurance without P&C agency management needs
best_when: An independent insurance agency or brokerage using Vertafore AMS360 or Sagitta wants AI agents to automate policy management, certificate generation, carrier data sync, and client service workflows.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Insurance policy data affects coverage accuracy and client financial protection. PRIVACY: Client personal data including financial and risk information requires careful handling.

auth.notes: Vertafore uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Separate API credentials per Vertafore product (AMS360, Sagitta). Agency-level credentials. Partner program required for third-party developer access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — insurance technology enterprise pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user agency licensing; partner program for technology integrations
pricing.notes: Denver-based, Francisco Partners portfolio company. Largest independent insurance distribution software provider in the US. Multiple product lines (AMS360, Sagitta, BenefitPoint).

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Policy data accuracy is critical — errors affect client insurance coverage
PRIVACY: Client financial and risk data is highly sensitive
No public MCP server — REST API with partner program required
No webhooks — must poll for data changes or use scheduled sync
Multiple product lines (AMS360 vs Sagitta) have different APIs — verify which applies
US data residency only — verify for international agency operations
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Insurance policy and client risk data. SOC2. OAuth2 with agency-level credentials. US data residency. Partner program required.

security_score_components.security_notes: Insurance policy and client personal/financial data. SOC2. OAuth2. US data residency only.
